title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same REST coverage as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama endpoints for chains, agents, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; no API keys needed, runs entirely local.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that adds fzf model picker, conversation history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions and chat copilot.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; chat, embed, pull, and list models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and managing Ollama models from Ruby/Rails.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot template that streams responses from a local Ollama backend.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks for Ollama + Open-WebUI, CUDA or CPU, with optional Ngrok tunnel.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama binary and systemd service; merged into nixpkgs unstable.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed chat, embed, and model APIs.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for offline LLM tests.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service generator: scaffold a typed REST API around any Ollama model in seconds.
